extracted.hook: Is NADN dead? This has been the biggest question that I've been getting over the past couple weeks.
transitions: So a little over a year ago when I started making YouTube videos about NINN, it was in hyperrowth mode and it was blowing up and videos were going viral left and right about NAND AI agents.
The other question I'm getting is I'm a beginner. I'm getting into AI. Which one do I go for?
And so basically my promise to you guys is that I don't know where the AI space is going.
extracted.cta: "if you enjoyed the video or you learned something new, please give a like. Definitely helps me out a ton."
extracted.analogies: "think of this as me expanding my tool set and hopefully expanding your guys' skills and knowledge onto different tools as well"

time_references: a little over a year ago
